title: 3rd International Symposium On Women In Audio Visual Culture

3rd International Symposium On Women In Audio Visual Culture

Paper Submission and Participation

Okan Homepage

Homepage

Paper Submission and Participation

MENU

Paper Submission and Participation

Abstracts should be submitted by logging into the      system after registering with the email address and password determined by      the participant, following the " Enter " button.

Presentations can be made in Turkish and      English.

Presentations should be prepared in 15      minutes.

Participants will not pay the congress fee for      accepted papers.

Symposium follows a rigorous review process to      ensure the quality and originality of the research presented. All      submitted abstracts or full-text papers undergo a comprehensive evaluation      by the Scientific Committee.

E-certificates will be given to the researchers for      the papers presented. Participation certificates will not be given to      researchers for non-presented papers.

No fee is required for participants attending as      listeners. Those attending as listeners must register with the email      address and password they choose after clicking the " Enter "      button.
